groups.label: Token verification & auth deduplication
findings: packages/core/src/token-verify.ts-Hardcoded `notBeforeLeeway = 30` seconds is not configurable-developer-review-f730b854-high
packages/core/src/token-verify.ts vs packages/server/src/lib/auth.ts-**Code duplication: two independent JWT verification impleme-historian-review-f730b854-high
packages/core/src/token-verify.ts-Inconsistent private member conventions. Methods use `_prefi-developer-review-f730b854-medium
packages/core/src/token-verify.ts-**Asymmetric leeway on exp creates 30s window where expired -historian-review-f730b854-medium
groups.rationale: All four findings target token-verify.ts (hardcoded leeway, naming conventions, expiry window) plus the duplication between token-verify.ts and auth.ts. Must be one worker to avoid conflicts.

groups.label: Core security: config, ACL, and scope parsing
findings: packages/core/src/config.ts-Wildcard scope normalization inconsistency. `normalizeScope(-developer-review-f730b854-high
packages/core/src/file-acl.ts-Default-open ACL model is security-sensitive. `checkPermissi-developer-review-f730b854-high
packages/core/src/file-acl.ts-**Default-open ACL model: no permissions = full access**-historian-review-f730b854-medium
packages/core/src/scope-parser.ts-**Scope parser rejects `*` (universal wildcard) in colon-seg-historian-review-f730b854-medium
packages/core/src/__tests__/config.test.ts-Test coverage gaps. Only 4 tests covering the happy path, ro-developer-review-f730b854-medium
groups.rationale: Config normalization, ACL defaults, and scope parsing are tightly coupled core security modules in the same directory. Config test coverage finding naturally belongs with the config fix.

groups.label: Shell scripts: relay.sh security and structure
findings: scripts/relay/relay.sh-**Shell code injection via `json_eval` and `config_value`**-historian-review-f730b854-high

scripts/relay/relay.sh-Large inline Node.js scripts embedded in bash heredocs (35+ -developer-review-f730b854-medium
scripts/relay/relay.sh-**1246-line bash script as critical infrastructure**-historian-review-f730b854-low
scripts/relay/dotfile-compiler.ts-CLI argument parsing uses bare `args.shift() ?? ""` without -developer-review-f730b854-low
groups.rationale: All relay.sh findings (injection, hardcoded secrets, dual scope format, inline scripts, size) belong together since they touch the same file. dotfile-compiler.ts is in the same scripts/relay directory.
